root_cause: Insufficient input validation on user-supplied data
attack_condition: Attacker can inject malicious scripts through form inputs
fix_strategy: Implement input sanitization and output encoding using a trusted library
code_pattern: Unescaped user input directly rendered in HTML context
description: XSS vulnerability in web application form handler

root_cause: Direct concatenation of user input into SQL queries
attack_condition: Attacker can manipulate SQL queries through input fields
fix_strategy: Use parameterized queries or prepared statements
code_pattern: String concatenation in SQL query construction
description: SQL injection vulnerability in database query handler

root_cause: Unsafe use of strcpy without bounds checking
attack_condition: Attacker can overflow buffer by providing oversized input
fix_strategy: Replace strcpy with strncpy or use safe string handling functions
description: Buffer overflow in string handling function
